body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Make a couple plots in the docs look nicer by making dt an even divisor of the diagnostic output, updating more frequently, and changing the location to not be over the ocean (this was due to the very low resolution of the forcing, not the lat/lon)


## Content

title: Update canopy docs

body:
This PR fix broken links in documentation tutorials, and properly references the literature. 
It makes use of Documenter.jl `@ref`, DocumenterInterLinks `@extref`, and DocumenterCitations `@citet` instead of hardcoding. 

closes #1345 
closes #256 

https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR1413/
title: Fix links and refs in documentation
